info.english_meaning: to go to howl to kill to destroy to hurt
info.hindI_arTa: jAnA SiSuprARI ke samAna pukAranA pIq0A karanA duHKa denA mAranA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: rezaRaM hiMsA ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' rezaRaM vfkaSabdaH  yadAha yAdavaprakASaH - ' vfkasya rezaRaM rezA hrezA hezA ca vAjinAm  bfMhitaM kariRAM SabdaH ' iti puruzakAraH  gatihiMsArTayoH sakarmakaH  vfkaSabdArTakatve tu akarmakaH iti boDyam  ' SravaRe ' ityapi kecit  ' gatiSozaRayoH ' iti nyAse (7.3.36) pAWaH  ' stravaRe rIyate rINo riRAtigatirezayoH ' (Slo. 18) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'niScarmaRo gAmariRIta DItiBiH' (f0 11617) carmaRo niriRIta=pfTak kuryAt viSlezayedityarTaH gAM nistvacaM kurvItetyAha
'e riRAti barhizi priyaM girA' (f0 9716) AriRAti AsrAvayati
'AsmE rIyante nivaneva sinDavaH' (f0 10409) ArIyante sravanti tvaritaM syandante
'mamatta yena niriRAsi SatrUn' (f0 101163) niriRAsi nirgamayasi parARudasi
'uzA hasreva niriRIte apsaH' (f0 11247) niriRIte nitarAM riRIte gamayati prakASayati
